rationale: Bug hunt on C10 rune activation code found CRITICAL race condition: _ogham_used flag set before await, causing UI lockup if dispatch fails (choice buttons and ogham buttons both disabled with no recovery path). Fixed with proper flag timing + button state management. Also added life/card status strip to encounter card overlay — players couldn't see their health during card choices because the overlay covers WalkHUD at layer 15. Color-coded PV bar with card count provides essential gameplay feedback.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 11 code. Then: improve minigame result feedback — add score multiplier display per bible s.2.5 (show x0.5/x1.0/x1.5 multiplier on result screen).
